homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental piece features a lively violin melody accompanied by flute, set against a rhythmic tabla background that creates an upbeat dance atmosphere. The track evokes an energetic mood suitable for an Indian-themed movie or television soundtrack, standing apart from the smoother jazz and saxophone styles often found in similar archival uploads.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental piece utilizes intricate sound design and organic field recordings to craft an immersive experience without vocals. Driven by the natural chirping of frogs in a binaural recording, the track creates a meditative atmosphere that highlights complex textures and rhythms. The combination of electronic synthesizer elements and raw nature sounds offers a captivating listening journey focused entirely on ambient texture.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track serves as an ideal accompaniment for a Spanish-themed party or a romantic evening, featuring acoustic guitars and Latin percussion that create a lively atmosphere. The music combines folk and pop elements to form a perfect background sound for dancing and enjoying the moment.

questions.name: Sample 7
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment is an immersive instrumental nature soundtrack featuring synthesizers, bass, and percussion that create a soothing, ethereal soundscape. The slow, deliberate rhythm supports field recordings of ocean waves and bird calls, evoking the atmosphere of a tranquil beach scene. These combined elements make the track ideal for use as a backdrop in a nature documentary or a reflective travel vlog.

questions.name: Sample 8
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This energetic instrumental rock track features a fast tempo driven by electric guitar, bass guitar, and acoustic drums. The atmosphere is intense and suitable for a high-energy live concert setting or an action scene in a movie. Although male vocals are present in the original recording, this specific segment focuses on the driving instrumentation of the rock anthem.

questions.name: Sample 9
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This intense instrumental track fuses heavy elements of rock, metal, and industrial styles to create a powerful soundscape. Distorted electric guitars dominate the mix with a dark and aggressive mood that drives the music forward. While inspired by improvisations built around a steady pulse, the piece relies entirely on layered instrumentation rather than vocals or traditional song structures.

Despite the composer's original description of playful dolphin visuals, the actual audio remains serious and urgent in its delivery.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
